chunks.title: The Song of the Vineyard
chunks.reason: A complete parable introducing the metaphor of Israel as God's vineyard and its subsequent failure.

chunks.title: Woe to the Greedy and Drunkards
chunks.reason: A series of judgments against social greed and excess drinking leading to exile.

chunks.title: Humiliation and Exaltation
chunks.reason: A contrast between the coming judgment on human pride and God's future exaltation.

chunks.title: Woe to the Perversely Wise
chunks.reason: A concentrated section of 'woe' oracles targeting specific moral and spiritual perversions.

chunks.title: The Coming Army
chunks.reason: A vivid description of the divine judgment executed by a distant army.
